weixin.name: Weixin
weixin.description: Connects Magi to Weixin through the official iLink bot gateway for direct chat messages.

weixin:channel.description: Connects Magi to Weixin through the official iLink bot gateway for direct chat messages.

bot_token.label: Bot Token
bot_token.description: iLink bot token returned by the Weixin QR login flow. Leave empty when using a credentials file.

account_id.label: Account ID
account_id.description: iLink bot account ID. Leave empty only when the state directory contains exactly one logged-in account.

credentials_path.label: Credentials File
credentials_path.description: Optional JSON credentials file with token, account_id, base_url, and user_id fields.

state_dir.label: State Directory
state_dir.description: Directory used for QR-login credentials, getUpdates cursor, and context tokens.

allowed_user_ids.label: Allowed Weixin User IDs
allowed_user_ids.description: Whitelist of Weixin user IDs. Empty means allow all users who can message this bot.

enable_typing_indicator.label: Typing Indicator
enable_typing_indicator.description: Send Weixin typing status while Magi is processing a message.

bot_type.label: Bot Type
bot_type.description: iLink bot_type used by the QR login helper.

route_tag.label: Route Tag
route_tag.description: Optional SKRouteTag header for internal routing.

max_message_length.label: Max Message Length
max_message_length.description: Maximum characters per Weixin outbound text message.

poll_timeout_ms.label: Poll Timeout
poll_timeout_ms.description: Long-poll timeout in milliseconds for getUpdates.

qr_login.label: Weixin QR Login
qr_login.description: Scan with Weixin to authorize this channel without pasting a bot token manually.

validate_credentials.label: Validate Credentials
validate_credentials.description: Check the saved Weixin credentials and gateway connection.

action_messages.scan: Scan this QR code with Weixin.
action_messages.scanned: QR code scanned. Confirm the login in Weixin.
action_messages.redirecting: QR code scanned. Following Weixin login redirect.
action_messages.no_qr: The Weixin gateway did not return a QR code.
action_messages.expired_too_many: The QR code expired too many times.
action_messages.refresh_failed: The Weixin gateway did not refresh the QR code.
action_messages.refreshed: QR code refreshed. Scan the new code with Weixin.
action_messages.missing_credentials: Login confirmed, but account credentials were missing.
action_messages.validate_missing_credentials: No Weixin credentials are configured yet.
